title: papaver × anthemani
intro: Papaver × anthemani, also known as the Iceland poppy, is a hybrid flowering plant that combines the characteristics of two different species of poppies. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of using Papaver × anthemani include relief from pain and muscle cramps, as well as improved sleep quality and reduced anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into a tea or infused in hot water to release its active compounds and provide therapeutic benefits.
